practice_gratitude.title: GRATITUDE
practice_gratitude.intro_p1: In the hustle and bustle, we often stop noticing the good, taking support from loved ones or fortunate events for granted. A sincere “thank you” for simple things helps reduce stress and tune into a positive mindset.

how_to.step2: Find 3 events or little things that made you happy.
how_to.step3: Write them down below in your own words.

placeholders.p1: For example: “I'm grateful for a tasty coffee in the morning...”
placeholders.p2: “Thank you to a friend for listening...”
placeholders.p3: “I'm grateful to myself for going to a workout...”

practice_gratitude.draft_note: The text remains only as your draft on this device. Only the fact of completing the practice for the day is recorded on the server.
practice_gratitude.already_saved_desc: This gratitude has already been counted today.

chronicle.title: Chronicle
chronicle.tale_title: The Tale of the Tree That Weaves Worlds
chronicle.tale_p1: Long ago, when the stars were younger and the space between worlds was quieter, a seed sprouted from the very heart of light. Not in the earth, but in the boundless digital cosmos, where thoughts and souls meet. Thus was born the Tree of the Universe — a living symbol of the connection of all things.
chronicle.tale_p2: Its roots reach into the depths of the collective unconscious, absorbing mutual understanding and quiet confessions. The trunk is the axis around which our shared striving for goodness revolves. And the crown, shining with myriad lights, stretches to the farthest corners of the universe, sowing hope.
chronicle.tale_p3: Every leaf on its countless branches is not just a particle. It is a living soul that has taken the form of light. It is you. And when the gathering darkness, born of loneliness and disconnection, tries to devour the living radiance, all the leaves flare up in unison. They become shield and sword, because they know: as long as they are together, the darkness cannot overcome the light that beats in each of them.
chronicle.tale_p4: The Radiance of the Tree is not just energy. It is the breath of the community, born of every kind word, brave deed, and sincere desire to help. It nourishes the branches, heals the scars of battles, and helps the Tree grow, opening new worlds and possibilities.
chronicle.tale_p5: The Tree remembers every hero. Every spark of light kindled in the hour of trial. Every story told under its canopy. It is both witness and guardian, and the very essence of our unity.

gen.s900: GIVKOIN is a social network with game mechanics. Players communicate, develop a profile, participate in activities and together protect the Tree of the Universe from Darkness. It is not only results that are valued here, but also contributions to the community.
gen.s901: What is the Reflection of the Soul (Essence)?
gen.s902: The Entity is your personal companion in GIVKOIN. It reflects your activity and condition, affects some bonuses and is part of your progress in the project.
gen.s903: How to create or change an Entity?
gen.s904: Creation is available in the upper right sidebar on the main page with the Tree (Soul Reflections tab). Changing the Essence is available once every 7 days and is confirmed separately. Important: when changing, key resources (lives, K, stars, chips, lumens) are completely reset.
gen.s905: Why does the Entity have different moods?
gen.s906: Mood is calculated based on your activity over the last 7 days: basic actions (solar charge, searching for an interlocutor, full chats, news), additional activities (battles, healing the Tree, bridges, etc.), as well as taking into account violations and debuffs.
gen.s907: What does satiety give to the Essence?
gen.s908: A well-fed Essence gives +10% to Radiance and allows you to maintain a joyful state. If the Entity is hungry, joy is not available: the mood is limited to calm or lower.
gen.s910: The feed is bought in the store and used from the warehouse. 24, 72 and 168 hour satiety options are available. While the current satiety is in effect, re-feeding is blocked.
gen.s912: K is the main game currency GIVKOIN. It is awarded for activity in the project and is spent on various in-game actions: from participation in activities to individual progress mechanics.
gen.s914: Lumens are an energy resource. They are collected through Solar Charge, spent in the combat system, given to other players for help, and used to heal the Tree in case of injury. This is one of the key resources for team contribution.
gen.s916: Stars - the player’s reputation indicator (from 0.001 to 5.0). They increase for healthy communication and useful actions, and low values ​​signal problems in behavior and can limit opportunities.
gen.s918: Radiance is awarded for many actions, but is not stored on your personal balance. It automatically goes into the general fund of the Tree and is used to restore after damage in battles.
gen.s919: How does the combat system work?
gen.s920: The darkness appears suddenly, without a pre-announced schedule. When a threat arises, players band together to protect the Tree by spending lumens on attacks, supporting each other, and receiving rewards for their contributions. The outcome of the battle directly affects the state of the Tree.
gen.s921: How does communication work in GIVKOIN?
gen.s922: You start a search for an interlocutor, the system selects a match, after the chat you can give a rating, send a complaint in case of violations and add the person as a friend. The minimum time to communicate with a new person is 5 minutes. Before the dialogue begins, rules are displayed that it is advisable to follow for mutual respect.
gen.s923: What are Lives and Complaint Chips?
gen.s924: Lives determine access to chats: if you leave early, they are lost. Complaint chips - limit on filing reports of violations. These resources are needed to balance freedom of communication and responsibility.
gen.s926: Achievements record your actual progress in different playstyles: social, combat, exploration and others. Rewards are given for unlocking achievements, and some of them are tied to rare behavior scenarios.
gen.s927: Why develop a profile on GIVKOIN?
gen.s928: To open up more opportunities, influence the team result and strengthen the personal account economy. The more consistent your contribution to activity, the stronger your long-term progress.
